prestazioni: Replace the stock 3.5L Menard V8 (engine code: *CAPARO-MENARD V8*) with a bespoke *RML Group* 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, bored and stroked to 4.2L using forged *Mahle Motorsport* pistons (12.5:1 compression), *Pauter* H-beam connecting rods, and a *Carrillo* crankshaft for 700+ HP at 10,500 RPM with a *Titan Motorsport* dry-sump oiling system

Install a *Penske 8760* 3-way adjustable coilover suspension with *Eibach* ERS race springs (800 lb/in front, 1200 lb/in rear), *Ohlins* TTX40 dampers, and *SPL Parts* spherical bearing monoball control arms for sub-2.0s lateral G cornering

Upgrade the stock *AP Racing* CP8466 carbon-carbon clutch with a *Tilton* 7.25" triple-plate ceramic clutch, *Hewland* FTR sequential gearbox (6-speed, paddle-shift actuated), and *Quaife* ATB differential with 75% lock for 0-60 mph in 2.4s
estetica: Full *CAPARO T1 Club Sport* carbon-fiber aero package (front splitter, rear diffuser, and *Vortex Generator* rear wing) with *AeroCatch* quick-release fasteners for 1,200 kg downforce at 180 mph
Custom *VIS Racing* carbon-fiber side skirts with integrated *AIM MXL2* data logger and *Bosch* MS5.1 pressure sensors for real-time telemetry overlay on *Motec* C127 dash

*BBS FI-R* 18" forged magnesium wheels (9.5" front, 13" rear) wrapped in *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R* tires (245/35 R18 front, 335/30 R18 rear) with *Hankook* Ventus R-S4 semi-slick compounds for track use
